name: chain_global
arm: global-edit stress case: tests the stated tension between aggressive preservation and edits that legitimately need global change
note: Step 1 is scope global: crop mode must fall back to full frame, and diff compositing must not block the relight. Step 2 checks a local edit still works after a global one.

steps.instruction: Change the lighting of the whole scene to warm golden hour evening light.
Change her sneakers to black leather loafers.
